name: Bruno Mars
abstract: Peter Gene Hernandez (born October 8, 1985), known professionally as Bruno Mars, is an American singer-songwriter, record producer and dancer. Regarded as a pop icon, he is known for his three-octave tenor vocal range, live performances, retro showmanship, and musical versatility.

concerts.label: The Revlon Concert for The Rainforest Fund: Songs from the Silver Screen
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

works.t: You Can't Always Get What You Want

about_quotes.speaker: Charles Calello
about_quotes.evidence: And I love Bruno Mars. So I worked on the arrangement for three weeks until I came up with the idea. ... it was something like I said I don't have it yet.
about_quotes.doc_title: Charles Calello interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 21, 2025
